defaultMissionText: I need an HDMI cable. Find the exchange hub with one available.
missionExamples: I need an HDMI cable. Find the exchange hub with one available.
Get me a USB-C to USB-A cable from the cable exchange.
I need an Ethernet cable. Find a nearby exchange hub.
Borrow a USB-C to USB-C cable from the network.
Get me a 3.5 mm audio cable from a cable hub.
